description: Comprehensive observability dashboard for Companion — SLIs/SLOs, RED metrics, error analysis, downstream API performance, and custom business metrics (agents, tools, conversations, guardrails, intent classification, RAG, feedback).

panels.description:
Service Level Indicator: percentage of requests that did NOT return a 5xx status code over the selected time range.

SLO Target: 99.9%
panels.title: Availability SLI (SLO: 99.9%)

panels.description:
Service Level Indicator: p95 request latency.

SLO Target: p95 < 30s

Gauge shows the current p95 value. Green means within SLO.
Note: Financial Companion uses LLM calls, so higher latency thresholds are expected.
panels.title: Latency SLI — p95 (SLO: < 30s)

panels.description:
Service Level Indicator: percentage of downstream API calls that did NOT return a 5xx or connection error.

SLO Target: 99.5%
panels.title: Downstream Availability SLI (SLO: 99.5%)

panels.description:
Percentage of error budget remaining for the Availability SLO (99.9%).

Error budget = 0.1% of total requests.
100% = no budget consumed, 0% = budget exhausted.
panels.title: Error Budget Remaining (Availability)

panels.description:
How fast the error budget is being consumed.

- 1.0x = consuming at sustainable rate (budget lasts the full window)
- >1.0x = consuming too fast (budget exhausted before window ends)
- 14.4x over 1h = alerts should fire (fast burn)
- 6x over 6h = alerts should fire (slow burn)
panels.title: Availability SLO — Burn Rate

panels.description:
p95 request latency over time.

The red threshold line at 30s shows the SLO target. Values below the line = compliant.
panels.title: Latency SLO — p95 Over Time (SLO: < 30s)

panels.description: Total number of HTTP requests received over the selected time range.
panels.title: Total Requests

panels.description: Average requests per second over the selected time range.
panels.title: Rate (TPS)

panels.description:
Percentage of requests returning a 5xx status code.

Uses `or vector(0)` to correctly display 0% when no errors are present.
panels.title: Error Rate (5xx)

panels.description: Median request latency (50th percentile) over the selected time range.
panels.title: Latency p50 (interaction)

panels.description: 95th percentile request latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: Latency p95 (interaction)

panels.description: 99th percentile request latency over the selected time range.
panels.title: Latency p99 (interaction)

panels.description: RED metrics broken down by HTTP route: total requests, requests per second, error rate, and latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99).

targets.expr:
100 * (
  (sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{job="financial-companion", http_route!~"/health.*", http_route!="", http_response_status_code=~"5.."}[$__range])) or (sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{job="financial-companion", http_route!~"/health.*", http_route!=""}[$__range])) * 0))
  /
  clamp_min(sum by (http_route) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{job="financial-companion", http_route!~"/health.*", http_route!=""}[$__range])), 1e-10)
)
histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, http_route) (increase(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="financial-companion", http_route!~"/health.*", http_route!=""}[$__range])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, http_route) (increase(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="financial-companion", http_route!~"/health.*", http_route!=""}[$__range])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, http_route) (increase(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="financial-companion", http_route!~"/health.*", http_route!=""}[$__range])))

panels.title: RED Metrics by Route

panels.description: Requests per second broken down by HTTP route.
panels.title: Requests per Second (by route)

panels.description:
Error rate percentage over time, broken down by status code class.

Fixed: uses `or vector(0)` to correctly display 0% when no errors exist.
panels.title: Error Rate Over Time (4xx / 5xx)

panels.description: Request latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99) over time.
panels.title: Latency Percentiles Over Time (p50 / p95 / p99)

panels.description: Distribution of HTTP response status codes over the selected time range.
panels.title: Status Code Distribution

panels.description: 5xx errors broken down by HTTP route over time.
panels.title: 5xx Errors by Route (Over Time)

panels.description: Top routes with the highest error counts (4xx + 5xx) over the selected time range.
panels.title: Top Error Routes (4xx + 5xx)

panels.description: Total number of outbound HTTP requests to downstream services over the selected time range.
panels.title: Total Downstream Calls

panels.description: Percentage of downstream calls returning 5xx or failing with connection/timeout errors.
panels.title: Downstream Error Rate (5xx + Conn Errors)

panels.description:
Average latency for outbound downstream API calls.

Computed as total duration / request count, which is more accurate than histogram_quantile given the coarse default OTEL bucket boundaries.
panels.title: Downstream Avg Latency

panels.description: Average outbound downstream requests per second over the selected time range.
panels.title: Downstream TPS

panels.description:
Downstream requests per second broken down by service name.

Shows traffic volume to each downstream dependency.
panels.title: Downstream TPS by Service (Over Time)

panels.description:
Error rate of downstream calls broken down by service.

Includes both 5xx responses and connection/timeout errors.

targets.expr:
100 * (
  (
    sum by (service_name) (rate(financial_companion_http_client_request_count_total{job="financial-companion", http_response_status_code=~"5.."}[$__rate_interval]))
    or
    sum by (service_name) (rate(financial_companion_http_client_request_count_total{job="financial-companion"}[$__rate_interval])) * 0
  )
  /
  sum by (service_name) (rate(financial_companion_http_client_request_count_total{job="financial-companion"}[$__rate_interval]))
)

panels.title: Downstream Error Rate by Service (Over Time)

panels.description:
Average latency of downstream API calls broken down by service name.

Computed as sum(duration) / count — more accurate than histogram_quantile when bucket boundaries are coarse.
panels.title: Downstream Avg Latency by Service (Over Time)

panels.description:
Maximum observed average latency per downstream service over time.

Shows the slowest-responding service at each point in time. Useful for identifying bottleneck dependencies.
panels.title: Top 5 Slowest Downstream Services (Avg Latency)

panels.description:
Total request count per downstream service over the selected time range.

Helps identify the most called dependencies.
panels.title: Downstream Request Count by Service

panels.description:
Total error count (5xx + connection errors) per downstream service over the selected time range.

Helps identify the most unreliable dependencies.

targets.expr:
topk(15, (
  (sum by (service_name) (increase(financial_companion_http_client_request_count_total{job="financial-companion", http_response_status_code=~"5.."}[$__range])) or vector(0))
  +
  (sum by (service_name) (increase(financial_companion_http_client_request_count_total{job="financial-companion", error_type!=""}[$__range])) or vector(0))
))

panels.title: Downstream Error Count by Service

panels.description:
Downstream requests per second by service over time, with inbound TPS overlay for comparison.

Peak column shows the highest observed TPS per service.
panels.title: Downstream Peak TPS by Service (Over Time)

panels.description: Approximate distinct authenticated user interactions over the selected time range.

targets.expr: count((max_over_time(sum by (fc_user_cif_hash) (fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum by (fc_user_cif_hash) (fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:])) > 0) or vector(0)

panels.title: Unique Users

panels.description: Total user messages sent over the selected time range.

targets.expr: clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:]), 0) or vector(0)

panels.title: Total User Messages

panels.description: Number of new conversations started over the selected time range.
panels.title: New Conversations

panels.description: Average number of conversations started per unique user over the selected time range.

targets.expr: (clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_conversation_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_conversation_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]), 0)) / clamp_min(count((max_over_time(sum by (fc_user_cif_hash) (fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum by (fc_user_cif_hash) (fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:])) > 0), 1)

panels.title: Avg Conversations / User

panels.description: Average number of user messages sent per unique user over the selected time range.

targets.expr: (clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:]), 0)) / clamp_min(count((max_over_time(sum by (fc_user_cif_hash) (fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum by (fc_user_cif_hash) (fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:])) > 0), 1)

panels.title: Avg Messages / User

panels.description: Average conversation size over the selected time range, measured as user messages per conversation.

targets.expr: (clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_message_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_message_role="user"})[$__range:]), 0)) / clamp_min((clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_conversation_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_conversation_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]), 0)), 1)

panels.title: Avg Conversation Size

panels.description: User message rate over time.
panels.title: User Messages Over Time

panels.description: Rate of new conversations being created.
panels.title: New Conversations Over Time

panels.description: Conversation closure rate broken down by reason / resume_point.
panels.title: Conversation Closures by Reason

panels.description: Total sub-agent executions over the selected time range.
panels.title: Total Agent Executions

panels.description: Percentage of agent executions that succeeded.

targets.expr: 100 * (clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_agent_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_agent_success="true"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_agent_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_agent_success="true"})[$__range:]), 0) or vector(0)) / clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_agent_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_agent_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]), 1)

panels.title: Agent Success Rate

panels.description: Total tool invocations across all agents over the selected time range.
panels.title: Total Tool Invocations

panels.description: Average sub-agent execution duration over the selected time range.
panels.title: Avg Agent Duration

panels.description: Average tool execution duration over the selected time range.
panels.title: Avg Tool Duration

panels.description: Total GenUI widget components created over the selected time range.
panels.title: GenUI Components

panels.description: Sub-agent execution rate broken down by agent type.
panels.title: Agent Executions by Type (Over Time)

panels.description: Sub-agent execution latency percentiles over time, broken down by agent type.
panels.title: Agent Execution Duration (p50 / p95) by Type

panels.description: Tool invocation rate broken down by tool name.
panels.title: Tool Invocations by Tool (Over Time)

panels.description: Average tool execution duration by tool name over time.

targets.expr: sum by (fc_tool_name) (rate(fc_tool_execution_duration_seconds_sum{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (fc_tool_name) (rate(fc_tool_execution_duration_seconds_count{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Tool Execution Duration by Tool (Avg)

panels.description: Top tools ranked by total invocation count over the selected time range.

targets.expr: topk(10, clamp_min(max_over_time(sum by (fc_tool_name) (fc_tool_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum by (fc_tool_name) (fc_tool_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]), 0))

panels.title: Top Tools by Invocation Count

panels.description: GenUI widget creation rate broken down by widget type.
panels.title: GenUI Components by Widget Type (Over Time)

panels.description: Per-agent-type breakdown: execution count, success rate, and average duration.

targets.expr:
100 * (
  (sum by (fc_agent_type) (max_over_time(fc_agent_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion", fc_agent_success="true"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(fc_agent_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion", fc_agent_success="true"}[$__range])) or (sum by (fc_agent_type) (max_over_time(fc_agent_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(fc_agent_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion"}[$__range])) * 0))
  /
  clamp_min(sum by (fc_agent_type) (max_over_time(fc_agent_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion"}[$__range]) - min_over_time(fc_agent_execution_count_total{job="financial-companion"}[$__range])), 1e-10)
)

panels.title: Agent Metrics by Type

panels.description: Total guardrail trigger events (where the guardrail actually blocked/flagged) over the selected time range.
panels.title: Guardrail Triggers

panels.description: Total guardrail output rewrites over the selected time range.
panels.title: Guardrail Rewrites

panels.description:
Percentage of guardrail checks that resulted in a block/trigger.

High values may indicate prompt injection attempts or policy violations.

targets.expr: 100 * (clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_guardrail_trigger_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_guardrail_triggered="true", fc_guardrail_name=~"v3_input_guardrails|parallel_input_guardrails|input_guardrails"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_guardrail_trigger_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_guardrail_triggered="true", fc_guardrail_name=~"v3_input_guardrails|parallel_input_guardrails|input_guardrails"})[$__range:]), 0) or vector(0)) / clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_guardrail_trigger_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_guardrail_name=~"v3_input_guardrails|parallel_input_guardrails|input_guardrails"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_guardrail_trigger_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_guardrail_name=~"v3_input_guardrails|parallel_input_guardrails|input_guardrails"})[$__range:]), 1)

panels.title: Guardrail Block Rate

panels.description: Guardrail trigger rate broken down by guardrail name and check type (input/output).
panels.title: Guardrail Triggers by Name (Over Time)

panels.description: Distribution of guardrail triggers by guardrail name over the selected time range.

targets.expr: clamp_min(max_over_time(sum by (fc_guardrail_name) (fc_guardrail_trigger_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_guardrail_triggered="true", fc_guardrail_name!~"v3_input_guardrails|parallel_input_guardrails|input_guardrails"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum by (fc_guardrail_name) (fc_guardrail_trigger_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_guardrail_triggered="true", fc_guardrail_name!~"v3_input_guardrails|parallel_input_guardrails|input_guardrails"})[$__range:]), 0)

panels.title: Guardrail Trigger Distribution

panels.description: Guardrail output rewrite rate broken down by origin type.
panels.title: Guardrail Rewrites by Origin (Over Time)

panels.description: Total intent classification routing decisions over the selected time range.
panels.title: Total Intent Classifications

panels.description: Total RAG knowledge base retrieval attempts over the selected time range.
panels.title: RAG Retrievals

panels.description: Percentage of RAG retrievals that succeeded.

targets.expr: 100 * (clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_rag_retrieval_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_rag_success="true"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_rag_retrieval_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_rag_success="true"})[$__range:]), 0) or vector(0)) / clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_rag_retrieval_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_rag_retrieval_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]), 1)

panels.title: RAG Success Rate

panels.description: Percentage of intent classifications that fell back to general_queries due to low confidence.

targets.expr: 100 * (clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_intent_classification_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_intent_fallback="true"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_intent_classification_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false", fc_intent_fallback="true"})[$__range:]), 0) or vector(0)) / clamp_min(max_over_time(sum(fc_intent_classification_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum(fc_intent_classification_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]), 1)

panels.title: Intent Fallback Rate

panels.description:
Intent classification rate broken down by agent domain.

Shows how user queries are being routed to different sub-agents.
panels.title: Intent Classifications by Domain (Over Time)

panels.description: Top intent classification domains ranked by total count over the selected time range.
panels.title: Top Intent Domains by Count

panels.description: RAG retrieval rate broken down by success/failure status.
panels.title: RAG Retrievals Over Time (Success / Fail)

panels.description:
Total handled business-logic errors over the selected time range.

These are errors explicitly caught and recorded via record_error().
panels.title: Handled Errors

panels.description:
Total ERROR and CRITICAL level log events emitted over the selected time range.

Captured automatically from the central logger.
panels.title: Log Errors (ERROR + CRITICAL)

panels.description:
Total WARNING level log events emitted over the selected time range.

Captured automatically from the central logger.
panels.title: Log Warnings

panels.description: Handled error rate broken down by agent that encountered the error.
panels.title: Handled Errors by Agent (Over Time)

panels.description:
Log-level error and warning event rate broken down by source module.

Combines fc.log.error.count and fc.log.warning.count.
panels.title: Log Errors & Warnings by Module (Over Time)

panels.description: Total log error counts broken down by source module over the selected time range.

targets.expr: topk(15, clamp_min(max_over_time(sum by (fc_log_module) (fc_log_error_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="true"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum by (fc_log_module) (fc_log_error_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="true"})[$__range:]), 0))

panels.title: Log Error Count by Module

panels.description: Total log warning counts broken down by source module over the selected time range.

targets.expr: topk(15, clamp_min(max_over_time(sum by (fc_log_module) (fc_log_warning_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]) - min_over_time(sum by (fc_log_module) (fc_log_warning_count_total{job="financial-companion", obstack="false"})[$__range:]), 0))

panels.title: Log Warning Count by Module

panels.description: Total feedback submissions over the selected time range.
panels.title: Total Feedback Submissions

panels.description: Percentage of feedback submissions with a positive rating (rating = 1) over the selected time range.

targets.expr: 100 * ((sum((clamp_min(last_over_time(fc_feedback_count_total{job="financial-companion", fc_feedback_rating="1"}[$__range]) - last_over_time(fc_feedback_count_total{job="financial-companion", fc_feedback_rating="1"}[$__range] offset $__range), 0)) or last_over_time(fc_feedback_count_total{job="financial-companion", fc_feedback_rating="1"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum((clamp_min(last_over_time(fc_feedback_count_total{job="financial-companion"}[$__range]) - last_over_time(fc_feedback_count_total{job="financial-companion"}[$__range] offset $__range), 0)) or last_over_time(fc_feedback_count_total{job="financial-companion"}[$__range])) or vector(0)), 1))

panels.title: Positive Feedback Rate

panels.description: Feedback submissions per query step, broken down by rating value.
panels.title: Feedback Submissions Over Time (by Rating)

title: Financial Companion Dashboard
